message:
feat: add type index on wisp_dependencies for blocker queries

Migration 008 adds idx_wisp_dep_type and idx_wisp_dep_type_depends
indices to the wisp_dependencies table. Without these, queries
filtering by type (used by computeBlockedIDs) perform full table
scans on 30K+ rows.

Also adds indexExists helper to the migrations package for
idempotent index creation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
